metadata.title: Mambu Data Assets
metadata.description: Starter catalog of key business, PII, and security-sensitive data assets for the Mambu domain.

assets.name: Customer Profile
assets.description: Core customer account, profile, and preference data used across domain journeys.
assets.accessScope: customer-facing journeys and approved internal operations
assets.businessMeaning: Core customer account, profile, and preference data used across domain journeys.

assets.name: Customer Contact Point
assets.description: Verified email, phone, and contactability state used for messaging and recovery.
assets.businessMeaning: Verified email, phone, and contactability state used for messaging and recovery.

interfaces.name: customer-contact-point api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Customer Contact Point.

assets.name: Consent Record
assets.description: Privacy, tracking, and communication consent history with auditable decisions.
assets.businessMeaning: Privacy, tracking, and communication consent history with auditable decisions.

assets.name: Identity Credential
assets.description: Credential metadata, password hashes, or authentication factor references.
assets.businessMeaning: Credential metadata, password hashes, or authentication factor references.

assets.name: Session Token
assets.description: Short-lived authenticated session state, refresh metadata, and revocation information.
assets.businessMeaning: Short-lived authenticated session state, refresh metadata, and revocation information.

assets.name: Access Policy
assets.description: Authorization rules, entitlements, restrictions, and access guardrails.
assets.businessMeaning: Authorization rules, entitlements, restrictions, and access guardrails.

assets.name: Audit Log
assets.description: Security and compliance event trail for sensitive operations and lifecycle changes.
assets.businessMeaning: Security and compliance event trail for sensitive operations and lifecycle changes.

assets.name: Payment Instrument Reference
assets.description: Tokenized payment method references or vaulted instrument links used in protected commerce flows.
assets.businessMeaning: Tokenized payment method references or vaulted instrument links used in protected commerce flows.

interfaces.name: payment-instrument-reference api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Payment Instrument Reference.

governance.sharingPolicy: approved payment and finance usage only

assets.name: Transaction
assets.description: Commercial or financial transaction state tracked across purchase, settlement, or payout workflows.
assets.businessMeaning: Commercial or financial transaction state tracked across purchase, settlement, or payout workflows.

governance.sharingPolicy: approved payment and finance usage only

assets.name: Ledger And Accounting Core
assets.description: Maintains accurate product-level balances, postings, and accounting events during coexistence and migration.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Ledger and Accounting Core.

interfaces.name: ledger-and-accounting-core api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Ledger And Accounting Core.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Api Gateway And Integration Layer
assets.description: Exposes secure product and account services to channels and partner systems using a reusable integration backbone.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on API Gateway and Integration Layer.

interfaces.name: api-gateway-and-integration-layer api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Api Gateway And Integration Layer.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Compliance Rules And Audit Controls
assets.description: Applies policy controls, audit trails, and configurable governance needed for regulated financial operations.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Compliance Rules and Audit Controls.

interfaces.name: compliance-rules-and-audit-controls api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Compliance Rules And Audit Controls.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Deposit Product And Account Lifecycle
assets.description: Handles account opening, funding, interest, fees, statements, and lifecycle states for deposit propositions.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Deposit Product and Account Lifecycle.

interfaces.name: deposit-product-and-account-lifecycle api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Deposit Product And Account Lifecycle.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Payment Orchestration And Scheme Connectivity
assets.description: Coordinates payment workflows and external scheme or processor integrations needed for modern money movement.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Payment Orchestration and Scheme Connectivity.

interfaces.name: payment-orchestration-and-scheme-connectivity api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Payment Orchestration And Scheme Connectivity.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Loan Product And Servicing
assets.description: Supports configurable loan structures, repayment plans, servicing states, and policy changes across lending products.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Loan Product and Servicing.

interfaces.name: loan-product-and-servicing api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Loan Product And Servicing.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Pricing And Policy Rules
assets.description: Allows credit and commercial teams to evolve rates, fees, and eligibility rules without rebuilding core workflows.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Pricing and Policy Rules.

interfaces.name: pricing-and-policy-rules api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Pricing And Policy Rules.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Governance Risk And Audit Controls
assets.description: Ensures lending operations remain traceable, policy-compliant, and reviewable as the business expands.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Governance, Risk, and Audit Controls.

interfaces.name: governance-risk-and-audit-controls api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Governance Risk And Audit Controls.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only
